pages.html:
Welcome!

Welcome to Introduction to Psychology. I am Dr. Rivera. Please read the syllabus and reach out via Canvas Inbox.
pages.text: Welcome! Welcome to Introduction to Psychology. I am Dr. Rivera. Please read the syllabus and reach out via Canvas Inbox.

pages.title: Syllabus
pages.html:
Syllabus

Academic Honesty: All work must be your own. AI policy: disclose any AI use. Disability Services: dsp@college.edu. Counseling: counseling@college.edu.

pages.title: Week 1 Overview
pages.html:
Week 1

By the end of this module you will be able to define psychology.
pages.text: Week 1 By the end of this module you will be able to define psychology.

assignments.title: Reflection Essay
assignments.html: Write a 300-word reflection. Submit as PDF. Graded with rubric.
assignments.text: Write a 300-word reflection. Submit as PDF. Graded with rubric.

discussions.title: Week 1 Discussion
discussions.html: Introduce yourself and share one reason you are interested in psychology.
